class.name: ActionPlan
class.description: A set of parallel steps for an application to carry out a command

attribute.name: execution_policy
attribute.description: How the application should execute steps of the action plan

attribute.name: application_name
attribute.description: Name of the application binary to run.

attribute.name: commandline_parameters
attribute.description: command line parameters to add when starting the application

attribute.name: log_path
attribute.description: Where the applications, controllers and infrastructure applications stdout/err go. This take precedence over the Session's log_path. If none of them is set, PWD is used.

relationship.name: application_environment
relationship.description: Define process environment for this application.

relationship.name: runs_on
relationship.description: VirtualHost to run this application on

relationship.name: exposes_service
relationship.description: Services exposed i.e. provided by this application

relationship.name: opmon_conf
relationship.description: description of the monitoring behaviour in the application

method.name: parse_commandline_parameters
method.description: Get the CLA for the application

method-implementation.prototype: const std::vector<std::string> parse_commandline_parameters() const

attribute.name: data_type
attribute.description: String identifying the data that travel through this connection. This can be used to match up the endpoints of this connection.

attribute.name: send_timeout_ms
attribute.description: Timeout in ms for sending on this connection

attribute.name: recv_timeout_ms
attribute.description: Timeout in ms for receiving on this connection

attribute.name: threads
attribute.description: Number of worker threads (not the number of workers which are processes)

attribute.name: interval_ms
attribute.description: Interval between publishes and polls of connectivity service information

attribute.name: host
attribute.description: Connectivity service Host

relationship.name: service
relationship.description: Connectivity service Service definition

attribute.name: application_name
attribute.description: Name of the application binary to run.

method.name: get_used_hostresources
method.description: Get the set of all HostComponents used by this application

method-implementation.prototype: std::set<const dunedaq::confmodel::HostComponent*> get_used_hostresources() const

method.name: construct_commandline_parameters
method.description: get the command line parameters for this application

method-implementation.prototype: const std::vector<std::string> construct_commandline_parameters(const conffwk::Configuration& confdb, const dunedaq::confmodel::Session* session) const

class.name: DaqModule
class.description: A plugin module for the app framework

relationship.name: inputs
relationship.description: List of connections to/from this module

relationship.name: outputs
relationship.description: Output connections from this module

class.name: DaqModulesGroup
class.description: Represents a group of DAQ Modules that can run commands in parallel as one of the steps of an ActionPlan.

method-implementation.prototype: bool is_disabled(const std::set<std::string>&) const override
virtual const std::vector<const ResourceBase*>& get_resources() const override
virtual bool is_disabled(const std::set<std::string>&) const override
virtual const std::vector<const ResourceBase*>& get_resources() const override
virtual bool is_disabled(const std::set<std::string>&) const override

attribute.name: tpg_channel_map
attribute.description: Trigger Primitive channel map

attribute.name: op_env
attribute.description: Operational environment

attribute.name: offline_data_stream
attribute.description: The data stream value that we send to offline.

method-implementation.prototype: bool is_disabled(const std::set<std::string>&) const override
std::vector<const confmodel::DetectorStream*> get_streams() const
bool is_disabled(const std::set<std::string>&) const override
virtual const std::vector<const ResourceBase*>& get_resources() const override

attribute.name: source
attribute.description: Source state

attribute.name: dest
attribute.description: Destination state

attribute.name: transition
attribute.description: The main transition that this pre/post transition applies to

class.name: GeoId
class.description: The location of a stream, in detector geographical coordinates.

method-implementation.prototype: nlohmann::json to_json(bool direct=false, bool skip_name=false) const

attribute.name: connection_type
attribute.description: Type of the network connection

relationship.name: associated_service
relationship.description: Service provided by this connection

attribute.name: pcie_addr
attribute.description: PCIe address of NIC on readout host

attribute.name: mac_address
attribute.description: Destination MAC address on readout host

attribute.name: ip_address
attribute.description: IP address in form a.b.c.d

attribute.name: interface_name
attribute.description: Name of interface e.g. eth0 or eno1

attribute.name: network_mask
attribute.description: Network mask in for a.b.c.d

attribute.name: network_name
attribute.description: Name of network on this interface Control or Data

attribute.name: interval_s
attribute.description: interval in seconds between the collection of monitoring data in an application

method.name: get_interval
method.description: obtain the interval casted in seconds

method-implementation.prototype: std::chrono::seconds get_interval() const

attribute.name: path
attribute.description: property used to generate the final URI

attribute.name: type
attribute.description: type of the OpMonFacility

method.name: get_URI
method.description: generate the opmon facility URI for the specified application

method-implementation.prototype: std::string get_URI( const std::string & app ) const

relationship.name: contains
relationship.description: List of hardware components on this host

attribute.name: queue_type
attribute.description: Type of queue

class.name: RCApplication
class.description: An executable which allows users to control datataking

method.name: construct_commandline_parameters
method.description: get the command line parameters for this rc application

method-implementation.prototype: const std::vector<std::string> construct_commandline_parameters(const conffwk::Configuration& confdb, const dunedaq::confmodel::Session* session) const

class.name: ResourceBase
class.description: Base class for all Resource objects. A Resource is an object with an enabled/disabled state. Derived classes must implement the is_disabled() method to return the state.

method.name: get_parents
method.description: The algorithm calculates a vector of segments which are parents of given segment. If the segment has parents referenced by the partition object, then: - in case of C++ it fills the parents parameter; otherwise it throws {@link NotFoundException} exception

method-implementation.prototype: void get_parents(const dunedaq::confmodel::Session& session, std::list< std::vector<const dunedaq::confmodel::ResourceBase *> >& parents) const
bool disabled(const dunedaq::confmodel::Session& session) const

method.name: is_disabled
method.description: Virtual method to be implemented by subclasses containing the logic to determine if this object should be considered disabled.

method-implementation.prototype: virtual bool is_disabled(const std::set<std::string>&) const

class.name: ResourceSet
class.description: Base class for a collection of Resource items. Derived classes must implement the get_resources() method to return a vector of Resource objects.

method.name: get_resources
method.description: Virtual method to obtain the list of all contained Resources. Used internally by the core disabled logic. Not intended to be used in application code as that should be using individual relationships of the derived classes.

method-implementation.prototype: virtual const std::vector<const ResourceBase*>& get_resources() const

class.name: ResourceSetDisableAND
class.description: Abstract base class for a resource set that determines it's disabled state by ANDing all its contained resources.

method.name: is_disabled
method.description: Method that ANDs all resources to determine disabled state.

method-implementation.prototype: bool is_disabled(const std::set<std::string>& disabled) const final

class.name: Segment
class.description: Logical sub division of the configuration that can be enabled/disabled as a group

relationship.name: segments
relationship.description: Nested list of Segments that form part of this Segment

relationship.name: applications
relationship.description: List of Applications that run in this Segment

relationship.name: controller
relationship.description: This Segment's run controller.

method-implementation.prototype: virtual bool is_disabled(const std::set<std::string>&) const override
virtual const std::vector<const ResourceBase*>& get_resources() const

attribute.name: description
attribute.description: A description of the session.

attribute.name: data_request_timeout_ms
attribute.description: The baseline data request timeout that will be used by modules in the Readout and Trigger subsystems (i.e. any module that produces data fragments). Downstream timeouts, such as the trigger-record-building timeout, are derived from this

attribute.name: data_rate_slowdown_factor
attribute.description: "Factor by which to suppress data generation.

attribute.name: rte_script
attribute.description: Path to a script for setting up the runtime environment for DAQ applications

attribute.name: controller_log_level
attribute.description: Log level to use for drunc controllers

attribute.name: log_path
attribute.description: Where the applications, controllers and infrastructure applications stdout/err go. This is overwritten by the Application's log_path. If none of them is set, PWD is used.

relationship.name: connectivity_service
relationship.description: Configuration for the Connectivity Service lookups

relationship.name: environment
relationship.description: Define process environment for any application run in given session.

relationship.name: disabled
relationship.description: Resources that should not participate in the current run

relationship.name: segment
relationship.description: List of configuration Segments that form this Session

relationship.name: opmon_uri
relationship.description: Configuration for the OpMon facilities used across the session

method.name: get_all_applications
method.description: Returns applications defined in the Session and all of its Segments.

method-implementation.prototype: std::vector<const dunedaq::confmodel::Application *> get_all_applications() const
method-implementation.body: BEGIN_PRIVATE_SECTION std::vector<const Application*>getSegmentApps(const Segment*,bool)const;END_PRIVATE_SECTION BEGIN_HEADER_PROLOGUE namespace dunedaq::confmodel{class Segment;} END_HEADER_PROLOGUE

method.name: get_enabled_applications
method.description: Returns all enabled applications defined in the Session and all of its Segments.

method-implementation.prototype: std::vector<const dunedaq::confmodel::Application *> get_enabled_applications() const

method.name: disabled_components
method.description: Get object describing all disabled components, either directly in the disabled relationship or due to dependencies among ResourceSets.

method-implementation.prototype: dunedaq::confmodel::DisabledResources& disabled_components() const

attribute.name: storage
attribute.description: Amount of disk storage available for output data on this host in GB

class.name: Variable
class.description: A Variable associates a value with string name. It is used for process environment and database strings substitution.

attribute.name: name
attribute.description: Name of the variable.

attribute.name: value
attribute.description: Value of the variable.

class.name: VariableBase
class.description: This abstract class is used to describe a single variable (name:value pair) or a set of variables.

attribute.name: description
attribute.description: Describes the purpose of the parameter.

class.name: VariableSet
class.description: Set of variables or variable sets. Names and values of all nested variables are added to value of relationship using resource set.

relationship.name: contains
relationship.description: List of included variables or variable sets.

relationship.name: uses
relationship.description: Hardware resources required by this virtual host

relationship.name: runs_on
relationship.description: The physical host that this virtual host runs on
